title: Naughty Boys
overview: Worick and Nicolas work as “Handymen” in Ergastulum where is under the control of 4 organizations. One day, they take destruction on the rising crime syndicate at the request of police.

title: Hundemarken
overview: Alex started working in Handymen’s office as man the phones. Nina who is the girl works in Dr. Theo’s clinic, asks Handymen for help. She said, there is a Twilights in men who came to threaten Dr. Theo.

title: Ergastulum
overview: Alex delivers drugs named Celebrer with Nicolas. She has many questions while working. What happened to Worick and Nicolas in the past? What kind of city is Ergastulum? What’s the “Twilights”?

title: Nonconformist
overview: Detective Chad Adkins took Worick and Nicolas as material witnesses for abandonment of many corpses. Then Worick receives contact from Daniel Monroe.

title: Sanctions
overview: Worick and Nicolas fight against men who make an assault on Monroe Family. Meanwhile, Gina Paulklee who is the boss of Paulklee Guild receives disturbing news.

title: Thorn
overview: Nina treats Nicolas’ injury in Dr. Theo’s clinic. On the other hand, Worick speculates that a chapter of accidents are closely connected with the 4 organizations.

title: Birth
overview: Worick suffers a same nightmare over and over. Detective Adkins heard the coroner’s report of Twilights’ corpses from Dr. Theo, and he has a question.

title: Evening Dress
overview: Worick asks Alex to go to an evening party under the auspice of Cristiano Family.

title: Siblings
overview: In Ergastulum, there are signs that Anti-Twilights raise a riot. The evening party should have been held safely, but it’s not so.

title: Land of Confusion
overview: Morning has come. Alex reflect on last night, she feel keenly that she couldn’t understand about this city and her friends.

title: Absence
overview: Alex takes shelter in Handymen’s office with Loretta, she remembers her past little by little. Meanwhile, the enemies invade Paulklee Guild.

title: Odds and Ends
overview: The peace of Ergastulum will be broken by the attacks of the radicalizing enemies. The enemies called “Esminets,” what’s their purpose?
